subject: Fermi GBM trigger 511851891/170322212 is not a GRB
body:
E. Bissaldi (Politecnico & INFN Bari)
reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM team:


"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 511851891/170322212
at 05:04:46.49 UT on 22 Mar 2017, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to local particles."
